pre_assessment.planned_strategy: Decompose bytes[31] via mod/div, factor out q*pow2(255), use lemma_small_mod after bounding the remainder
stated_uncertainties: How to bound the 31-byte prefix sum
Whether SMT sees the flat sum structure

attempt_1.code: [Algebraic decomposition + by(compute) for s_30 < pow2(248) + direct mul bounds]
attempt_1.error_message: 3 assertion failures: (1) u8_32_as_nat == rhs + q*pow2(255) — SMT can't chain the algebra, (2) s_30 < pow2(248) by(compute) — can't compute with symbolic bytes, (3) r*pow2(248) < pow2(255) — lemma_mul_strict_inequality arguments wrong

attempt_2.revision_description: Added to_nat_lemmas import, used case split on q with lemma_u8_32_as_nat_lt_pow2_255 (q==0) and lemma_bytes_as_nat_prefix_bounded + lemma_u8_32_as_nat_mod_truncates (q>=1)
attempt_2.code: [Case split approach with bridge lemmas from to_nat_lemmas]
attempt_2.error_message: 2 assertion failures: (1) rhs < p255 in q==0 case — SMT can't see rhs == u8_32_as_nat when q==0 because the flat expressions don't match, (2) rhs < p255 in q>=1 case — SMT can't bridge bytes_as_nat_prefix (recursive) to the flat rhs expression

post_assessment.stated_surprises: The fundamental bottleneck was bridging between the flat sum (u8_32_as_nat definition) and the recursive bytes_as_nat_prefix. The SMT solver cannot see they are equal without reveal_with_fuel or extensive intermediate assertions. The GT proof likely uses a chain of pre-existing bridge lemmas (lemma_from_u8_32_as_nat_01234 etc.) that build up the connection incrementally.
post_assessment.alternate_strategy: Would need reveal_with_fuel(bytes_as_nat_prefix, 32) or use the existing lemma_from_u8_32_as_nat chain instead of trying to build the bridge from scratch. The key missing piece is connecting the flat 32-term sum to the recursive prefix representation.

diagnosis.strategy_detail: The algebraic decomposition (mod/div on byte 31, factor out pow2(255), small_mod) is correct
diagnosis.lemma_detail: Found all needed lemmas (assemble_mod_div, mod_sum_factor, small_mod, prefix_bounded, lt_pow2_255)
diagnosis.verus_detail: Failed to bridge flat sum ↔ recursive bytes_as_nat_prefix. Needed reveal_with_fuel or the existing chain of bridge lemmas in the file
diagnosis.under_detail: Missing the recursive ↔ flat bridge assertions that the GT proof presumably includes
